words.def: an ability that has been acquired by training
words.zh: n. 技術；技能；技巧（skill的複數形式）

words.def: an ability that has been acquired by training
words.zh: n. 技術, 技巧, 技能, 熟練, 熟練工人

words.def: the act of terminating a life
words.zh: n. 殺戮；殺敵數；殲敵數（kill的複數形式）

words.def: the act of caressing with the lips (or an instance thereof)
the act of terminating a life
words.zh: n. 殺, 殺戮, 小河

words.def: an often persistent bodily disorder or disease; a cause for complaining
words.zh: n. 疾病, 壞事, 罪惡, 災難
